action.reasoning: Observation: The 42M-param ResMLP trained to 30 epochs achieved test mean_r2=0.5131, which is worse than the 10-epoch result (0.5206), indicating mild overfitting. Validation loss started rising after epoch 22 and ptend_q R2 declined. Analysis: The model has sufficient capacity but needs regularization (dropout) to generalize better. More raw capacity with dropout should allow higher peak R2 before overfitting. We have ~2.5h and 19 iterations left. Decision: Train a larger model (hidden_dim=2560, num_blocks=6, ~79M params) with dropout=0.1, cosine LR decay, and weight decay 2e-5. Save architecture config in checkpoint so predict.py can reconstruct it. Train for 15 epochs from scratch (~40-50 min estimated) and submit eval immediately.
